title: Presch Try Square 300 mm | Medium | Includes rust-free marking gauge (30cm), level bubble & marking pin | 90° & 45° | Carpenters square, Precision Square, Joiners Square, Engineers Square
features: Maximum Functionality: The woodworking Square not only serves for marking but also includes a scribing needle, a level, and a measuring gauge for precise markings.
Markings with precision: This high-quality carpenter square not only ensures exact 90° angles but also facilitates easy markings at 45°.
Precision Marking: Thanks to the integrated marking gauge, making even markings is effortless – No slipping due to the marking holes, ensuring extremely clean lines.
Everything at Hand: The screw-mounted marking needle in the handle of the carpenters tool ensures a smooth marking process – No additional accessories like a pen needed.
Align Horizontally: The engineering square not only facilitates marking and measuring but also includes a built-in level for horizontal alignment. Everything you need in one product.
description: Product Description Precise down to the last millimeter: PRESCH Precision Square 300mm PRESCH Precision Square 300mm Precise. High quality. Innovative. The PRESCH precision squares set new standards in terms of precision and user-friendliness. The marking holes are designed so that each pencil securely holds its place. No more searching for a pencil - the marking needle is always ready and attached to the square. With the additionally integrated level, it's easy to carry out all alignment work. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. What functions does the square offer in addition to the 90° & 45° angle markings? Marking gauge for parallel marking - level for horizontal alignment - dual-sided scale for measuring - marking needle for annotations. For what tasks is the 300mm size suitable? The size 300mm is ideal for measurements and markings in larger areas. What material are the bevel squares made of? The ruler is made of stainless steel, and the stop is made of lightweight, sturdy aluminum. Is the scale readable on both sides? Yes, the precision square has precise millimeter scales on both sides, starting at the zero point. Previous page Easy marking For pre-drawing right angles. Alternative angle marking For pre-drawing 45° angles. Exact alignment No slipping thanks to the marking holes in the marking gauge.
